items.title: DBS Bank and Goldman Sachs Execute First Interbank Crypto Options Trade
items.description: Two of the world’s largest financial institutions, DBS Bank and Goldman Sachs (GS), have executed the first-ever over-the-counter (OTC) cryptocurrency options trade between banks, signaling a major step toward integrating digital assets trading into traditional finance. The trade involved cash-settled Bitcoin BTC $110 356 24h volatility: 2.4% Market cap: $2.20 ...

items.title: 10 Financials Stocks Whale Activity In Today's Session
Can JPMorgan's IB Business Momentum Continue Into 2026?
items.description: JPMorgan's IB momentum stays strong with double-digit fee growth and a robust deal pipeline heading into 2026.

items.title: DBS, Goldman Sachs Execute First Over-the-Counter Interbank Crypto Options Trade
items.description: DBS said the deal involved trading cash-settled OTC bitcoin and ether options.

items.title: 3 Big Reasons GS Should Be On Your Watchlist
items.description: What a fantastic six months it’s been for Goldman Sachs. Shares of the company have skyrocketed 44%, hitting $790.44. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
